series_metadata.series_title: Transfer of Home-Based Student to School/District
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the transfer of home-based student to school/district, including placement/evaluation test results, notice of transfer, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after student graduates or withdraws from district ; Paper: Retain for 3 years after student graduates or withdraws from district, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
